entries.content: Primary repository working path is C:\Drive\Cargo\OpenCode_Rs.
Added Ratatui TUI binary as src/bin/opencode_tui.rs with Dashboard, Files, Messages, and Help screens.
TUI message panel uses OpenCode Core V2 API endpoints: POST /v2/session, POST /v2/session/{id}/prompt, GET /v2/session/{id}/message.
README path references were updated to C:\Drive\Cargo\OpenCode_Rs and TUI operation notes were refreshed.
UI strategy was split into two independent fronts: Flutter GUI (opencode-flutter) and Ratatui TUI (src/bin/opencode_tui.rs), both sharing existing backend APIs.
Flutter v1 implements login, test bypass, MainShell (Overview/Files/Settings), backend health check, paginated file list, local filename filter, and logout.
Flutter Windows run path was fixed by adding missing windows scaffold files, updating CMake flags (/FS), and resolving manifest/resource conflicts in runner build settings.
Backend capabilities were confirmed in two stacks: OpenCode_Rs API (auth, files, upload, sessions, admin/metrics) and opencode-core API (v2 session/prompt/message, SSE events, provider/find/browser).

Flutter integrated launcher completed: BLoC architecture (AuthBloc + LauncherBloc), Material 3 UI with 3 tabs (Launcher/AI Terminal/Settings), Dio HTTP client, Hive local storage, json_serializable code generation. Windows build successful. All 13 flutter tasks done.

Brace imbalance in opencode_tui.rs resolved: fn run_app was missing its closing } due to excess braces at lines 1973-1979 after the Dashboard match arm. Fixed by restoring correct brace structure (863 { = 863 }). cargo check now passes with 0 errors.

Component trait's render_with_context signature changed from `ctx: &dyn Any` to `ctx: &mut dyn Any` to allow render_chat (and any layer) mutable access to App for cursor management, markdown stream commits, and render timing. Compositor::render_with_context and all 4 layer implementations updated. Borrow conflicts resolved via raw-pointer split borrows.
